news.t: Jeff Reeves's Strength in Numbers: The ‘next big thing’ in tech is hiding among the small caps

holdings.infoBox: PSCT is an equity ETF with a total of 73 individual holdings. The top holdings are Semtech stock at 5.41%, Sanmina at 4.92%, Viavi Solutions at 4.19%, FormFactor at 3.93%, and Viasat at 3.07%.

overview.description: The Invesco S&P SmallCap Information Technology ETF (PSCT) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in information technology equity. The fund tracks a market-cap-weighted index of US small-cap technology companies. Its selection universe is limited to the S&P SmallCap 600 Index. PSCT was launched on Apr 7, 2010 and is issued by Invesco.

data.title: Jeff Reeves's Strength in Numbers: The ‘next big thing’ in tech is hiding among the small caps
data.text: For those who aren’t afraid of going “risk on” right now, here are some high-flying small-cap tech investments to consider, Jeff Reeves reports.
